attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.ATB_DTL_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.TASK_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.RESOURCE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.BUSINESS_SERVICE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.ARCHITECTURE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.TECHNOLOGY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.SUB_TECHNOLOGY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.PRCNT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.SOURCE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.TYPE1, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.ORIG_PERCENT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.ARCHITECTURE_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.TECHNOLOGY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.BUSINESS_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.SUB_TECHNOLOGY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.USER_WEIGHTAGE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.ACTIVITY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.OGG_KEY_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS,
 (
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS
minus
select OGG_KEY_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.OGG_KEY_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.OGG_KEY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_ATB_DETAILS.REFRESH_DATETIME
